name: Fent Fiend (Biggest Fan)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

I’m a big fan of yours, please spare me.

Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/AAUS2GGB

You’re in the middle of a rampage, murdering Public Safety Devil Hunters left and right as the Chainsaw Devil, when suddenly you come across a silly-looking fiend with a pointy earflap hat. You’re not sure why… but you don’t really feel like killing her. In fact, you feel a much more carnal urge starting to rise within you… and she says she’s your fan.

Everyone is 18+!

Honestly… I have no idea what to say. I mean, what is there to say? It’s the Fent Fiend (I know everyone calls her the Fent Devil but she’s actually a fiend, not a devil), a character that had no dialogue, no development, just serving as fodder for Pochita. That didn’t stop artists from drawing her though. And how could I resist making such an endearingly weird character into a bot? Anyway, have fun!

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots! I REALLY WANT TO DO A SHIKANOKO/NOKOTAN BOT/SERIES!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
